description_long: This is a compact, stylized airplane with a predominantly yellow and black color scheme, featuring a twin-boom tail and a high-mounted straight wing. The fuselage is short and rounded, with a forward-positioned cockpit that appears to be enclosed by a transparent canopy. Two engines are mounted on the wings, each with visible propellers, suggesting a twin-propeller configuration. The tail section consists of a horizontal stabilizer connecting two vertical fins, forming an H-tail design. The landing gear is fixed and tricycle-type, with two main wheels under the wings and a smaller nose wheel. The overall design is reminiscent of a light utility or sport aircraft, suitable for short-range urban or regional flights.
description: A small, yellow twin-propeller airplane with a high straight wing, H-tail, and forward enclosed cockpit, featuring fixed tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the twin propellers, high-mounted straight wing, and forward cockpit canopy.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the twin-boom tail, fixed landing gear, and engine placement on the wings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the H-tail configuration with two vertical stabilizers and the connecting horizontal stabilizer.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view emphasizing the cockpit position, wing structure, and tail assembly.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight configuration with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin piston engines mounted on the wings, each with a visible propeller.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with two vertical stabilizers connected by a horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy, likely single or dual seat.
